entry.title: New: CR 25-48 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 93, CD1 (2025), to amend the Fiscal Year 2026 Budget by amending Section 3.B.17, Department of Police, by transferring one equivalent personnel and $57,192 in Category A - Salaries for the reallocation of a vacant Emergency Services Dispatcher II position from the Technical and Support Services Program to an Investigator V position in the Administration Program.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
